links.targetTitle: DocumentToolbar exposes className enabledControls and callback props

title: Powerhouse publishes official Docker images for Connect (frontend + Nginx) and Switchboard (backend API) to ghcr.io
content: Three official images on `ghcr.io/powerhouse-inc/powerhouse/`: connect (Alpine + Node + Nginx with Brotli), switchboard (Node 24 + Prisma), academy (docs). Tags: latest, dev, staging, vX.Y.Z. Docker Compose stack: connect + switchboard + postgres:16.1. Connect startup: install PH_PACKAGES, `ph connect build`, configure/start Nginx. Switchboard startup: install PH_PACKAGES, run Prisma migrations, `ph switchboard`. Custom packages via `PH_PACKAGES` env var (comma-separated). Production: use specific version tags, persist postgres with volumes, bind to 127.0.0.1 behind a reverse proxy for SSL termination. Both require `DATABASE_URL` pointing to PostgreSQL.
description: Connect image builds frontend and serves via Nginx; Switchboard runs Prisma migrations then starts the API server.
